subcodes.first_line: O lover of the Glory of the All-Glorious! Your letter was received, and its contents were sweet and pleasing, for they were evidence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عاشق جمال ذوالجلال نامه شما رسید و مضمون شیرین و دلنشین بود زیرا دلیل
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
